title: open_file input
description: Open an existing vault file (any recognised type) as the focused, visible file in the running Obsidian workspace. Requires the target vault to be the currently focused vault.

vault.description: Display name of the vault that owns the target file. MUST be the currently focused Obsidian vault; otherwise the call fails with VAULT_NOT_FOUND (reason not-open).

path.description: Vault-relative path of the file to open (any type). Mutually exclusive with `file`. Must be structurally safe (no leading '/'/'\\'/drive letter, no '..' segments, no control characters).

file.description: Bare name of the file to open (resolved by Obsidian's link resolver; resolves attachments too). Mutually exclusive with `path`. MUST NOT contain '[[' or ']]' brackets; supply the bare name (e.g. 'My Note', not '[[My Note]]').

new_tab.description: When true, open in a new tab and leave the previously focused file open in its own tab. When false (default), focus an existing tab for the file if one is open (no duplicate), else open in the active tab.
